mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.symbol_id AS symbolId, s.code, s.name, o.side, o.order_type AS orderType, o.limit_price AS price, o.requested_quantity AS quantity, o.filled_quantity AS filledQuantity, o.status, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM orders o JOIN symbols s ON s.id = o.symbol_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status IN ('NEW', 'PARTIAL') ORDER BY o.created_at ASC, o.id ASC

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.symbol_id AS symbolId, s.code, s.name, o.side, o.order_type AS orderType, o.limit_price AS price, o.requested_quantity AS quantity, o.filled_quantity AS filledQuantity, o.status, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM orders o JOIN symbols s ON s.id = o.symbol_id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, initial_cash AS initialCash, cash_balance AS cashBalance, created_at AS createdAt FROM accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, symbol_id AS symbolId, quantity, available_quantity AS availableQuantity, avg_cost AS avgCost, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM positions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND symbol_id = #{symbolId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT close AS price, CAST(CONCAT(trade_date, ' 00:00:00') AS DATETIME) AS matchedAt, 'DAILY' AS source FROM daily_prices WHERE symbol_id = #{symbolId} AND close IS NOT NULL ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trades (user_id, order_id, symbol_id, side, quantity, price, amount, fee, executed_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{symbolId}, #{side}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount}, 0, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO positions (user_id, symbol_id, quantity, available_quantity, avg_cost, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{symbolId}, #{quantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{avgCost}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO matching_runs (user_id, scanned_count, filled_count, skipped_count, total_amount, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{scanned}, #{filled}, #{skipped}, #{totalAmount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, scanned_count AS scanned, filled_count AS filled, skipped_count AS skipped, total_amount AS totalAmount, created_at AS createdAt FROM matching_runs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
